question: What is the price of the Pro plan?
answer: $49 per user per month

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription

question: Does NexaCRM integrate with Slack?
answer: Yes, native Slack integration is available on all plans

question: Is customer data encrypted at rest?
answer: Yes, all data is encrypted using AES-256

question: What is the free trial period?
answer: 14 days, no credit card required

question: How many users can I add on the Starter plan?
answer: Up to 5 users

question: Can I export my data if I cancel?
answer: Yes, full data export is available for 30 days after cancellation

question: What CRMs can NexaCRM migrate data from?
answer: Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zoho

question: Is there a mobile app available?
answer: Yes, available on iOS and Android

question: What happens if I exceed my storage limit?
answer: You will be notified and prompted to upgrade your plan

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click Forgot Password on the login page and follow the email instructions

question: What is the Enterprise plan price?
answer: Custom pricing, contact sales for a quote

question: Does NexaCRM support GDPR compliance?
answer: Yes, NexaCRM is fully GDPR compliant

question: Can I use NexaCRM offline?
answer: No, NexaCRM requires an internet connection

question: How do I add a new team member?
answer: Go to Settings > Team > Invite Member and enter their email

question: What file formats can I import contacts from?
answer: CSV, Excel, and vCard formats are supported

question: Is there a free plan available?
answer: Yes, a free plan is available for up to 2 users with limited features

question: How long is data retained after account deletion?
answer: Data is retained for 90 days after account deletion before permanent removal

question: Does NexaCRM integrate with Google Workspace?
answer: Yes, full integration with Gmail, Calendar, and Drive

question: What is the uptime SLA?
answer: 99.9% uptime guaranteed for Pro and Enterprise plans

question: Can I customize the CRM pipeline stages?
answer: Yes, pipeline stages are fully customizable on all paid plans

question: How do I generate a sales report?
answer: Go to Reports > Sales > Select date range > Export

question: Is two-factor authentication available?
answer: Yes, 2FA is available and recommended for all accounts

question: What payment methods are accepted?
answer: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: Email support@nexacrm.com or use the live chat in the app

question: Can I integrate NexaCRM with my website?
answer: Yes, via our JavaScript widget or REST API

question: What is the maximum storage per account?
answer: Starter: 5GB, Pro: 50GB, Enterprise: Unlimited

question: Does NexaCRM have an API?
answer: Yes, a full REST API is available on Pro and Enterprise plans

question: How do I bulk delete contacts?
answer: Select contacts using checkboxes, then click Actions > Delete Selected

question: Can I set user permission levels?
answer: Yes, Admin, Manager, and Viewer roles are available

question: Is there a limit on email campaigns?
answer: Starter: 1000 emails/month, Pro: 50000 emails/month, Enterprise: Unlimited

question: How do I set up email automation?
answer: Go to Automation > New Workflow > Select Email trigger

question: Does NexaCRM support multiple currencies?
answer: Yes, over 50 currencies are supported

question: Can I white-label NexaCRM?
answer: White-labeling is available on the Enterprise plan only

question: How do I upgrade my plan?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan

question: What browsers are supported?
answer: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge are fully supported

question: How do I set up a custom domain?
answer: Custom domains are available on Pro and Enterprise plans via Settings > Domain

question: Is there a knowledge base or help center?
answer: Yes, available at help.nexacrm.com

question: Can I schedule meetings from NexaCRM?
answer: Yes, meeting scheduling integrates with Google Calendar and Outlook

question: How do I track email opens?
answer: Email tracking is enabled by default on Pro and Enterprise plans

question: What is the refund policy?
answer: Full refund available within 30 days of purchase

question: Does NexaCRM support SSO?
answer: Yes, SAML-based SSO is available on Enterprise plans

question: How many pipelines can I create?
answer: Unlimited pipelines on Pro and Enterprise, 1 pipeline on Starter

question: Can I import data from spreadsheets?
answer: Yes, Excel and CSV imports are supported

question: Is there a desktop app?
answer: No desktop app, NexaCRM is fully web-based

question: How do I create a custom report?
answer: Go to Reports > Custom > Add Fields > Save

question: What is the contact storage limit?
answer: Starter: 1000 contacts, Pro: 100000 contacts, Enterprise: Unlimited

question: Can I send SMS from NexaCRM?
answer: Yes, SMS campaigns are available via Twilio integration

question: How do I set up a sales funnel?
answer: Go to Pipelines > New Pipeline > Add Stages

question: Does NexaCRM have a Zapier integration?
answer: Yes, NexaCRM connects to 3000+ apps via Zapier

question: How do I archive a contact?
answer: Open the contact profile and click Actions > Archive

question: Is phone support available?
answer: Phone support is available for Enterprise customers only

question: Can I track website visitors in NexaCRM?
answer: Yes, via the NexaCRM web tracking pixel

question: How do I create a contact segment?
answer: Go to Contacts > Segments > New Segment > Add Filters

question: What analytics are available?
answer: Sales analytics, email analytics, pipeline analytics, and custom dashboards

question: Is there a sandbox or test environment?
answer: Yes, a sandbox environment is available on Enterprise plans

question: How do I enable dark mode?
answer: Go to Settings > Appearance > Theme > Dark

question: Can I create custom fields?
answer: Yes, unlimited custom fields on Pro and Enterprise plans

question: How do I set up a webhook?
answer: Go to Settings > Integrations > Webhooks > Add Webhook

question: Does NexaCRM support multiple languages?
answer: Yes, available in English, Spanish, French, German, and Japanese

question: How do I merge duplicate contacts?
answer: Go to Contacts > Duplicates > Review > Merge

question: Can I assign tasks to team members?
answer: Yes, tasks can be assigned via the contact or deal view

question: Is there an audit log?
answer: Yes, full audit logs available on Pro and Enterprise plans

question: How do I set up lead scoring?
answer: Go to Settings > Lead Scoring > Add Scoring Rules

question: Can I create email templates?
answer: Yes, unlimited email templates on all paid plans

question: How do I track deals?
answer: Go to Deals > Pipeline View to see all deals by stage

question: Does NexaCRM integrate with HubSpot?
answer: Data migration from HubSpot is supported but live sync is not available

question: How do I set up notifications?
answer: Go to Settings > Notifications > Configure alert preferences

question: Can I run A/B tests on emails?
answer: Yes, A/B testing is available on Pro and Enterprise plans

question: How do I create a landing page?
answer: Go to Marketing > Landing Pages > New Page

question: Is there a NexaCRM Chrome extension?
answer: Yes, available in the Chrome Web Store for Gmail integration

question: How do I set revenue goals?
answer: Go to Reports > Goals > Add Revenue Target

question: Can I create recurring tasks?
answer: Yes, recurring tasks can be set up with custom frequency

question: How do I export contacts?
answer: Go to Contacts > Select All > Export > Choose format

question: Does NexaCRM support LinkedIn integration?
answer: Yes, LinkedIn Sales Navigator integration is available on Enterprise

question: How long does onboarding take?
answer: Self-service onboarding takes 30 minutes, guided onboarding available for Enterprise

question: Can I track email bounces?
answer: Yes, bounce tracking is automatic on all email campaigns

question: How do I create a contact form?
answer: Go to Marketing > Forms > New Form > Embed on website

question: Is there a NexaCRM community forum?
answer: Yes, at community.nexacrm.com

question: How do I set up multi-step automation?
answer: Go to Automation > New Workflow > Add multiple action steps

question: Can I track phone calls in NexaCRM?
answer: Yes, call logging is available with native VoIP integrations

question: How do I create a deal?
answer: Go to Deals > New Deal > Enter deal name, value, and stage

question: Does NexaCRM have a forecasting feature?
answer: Yes, revenue forecasting is available on Pro and Enterprise plans

question: How do I set user working hours?
answer: Go to Settings > Team > Select User > Set Working Hours

question: Can I create product catalogs?
answer: Yes, product catalogs can be linked to deals on Pro and Enterprise

question: How do I integrate with Stripe?
answer: Go to Settings > Integrations > Stripe > Connect Account

question: Is there a NexaCRM API rate limit?
answer: 1000 requests per hour on Pro, 10000 per hour on Enterprise

question: How do I create a drip campaign?
answer: Go to Automation > Drip Campaigns > New Campaign > Set schedule

question: Can I set deal probability?
answer: Yes, probability can be set per stage or manually per deal

question: How do I remove a team member?
answer: Go to Settings > Team > Select Member > Remove from Team

question: Does NexaCRM support video calls?
answer: Yes, Zoom and Google Meet integrations are available

question: How do I set up a chatbot?
answer: Go to Marketing > Chatbot > New Bot > Configure flows

question: Can I track contract status?
answer: Yes, contract tracking with e-signature via DocuSign integration

question: How do I set up territory management?
answer: Territory management is available on Enterprise plans via Settings > Territories

question: Is NexaCRM SOC 2 certified?
answer: Yes, NexaCRM is SOC 2 Type II certified

question: How do I clone a pipeline?
answer: Go to Pipelines > Select Pipeline > Actions > Duplicate

question: Can I add notes to a contact?
answer: Yes, notes can be added from the contact profile under the Activity tab

question: How do I set up round-robin lead assignment?
answer: Go to Settings > Lead Routing > Round Robin > Add team members

question: Does NexaCRM have a mobile SDK?
answer: Yes, iOS and Android SDKs are available for Enterprise customers

question: How do I view activity history for a contact?
answer: Open the contact profile and click the Activity tab
